news_title: Xenetic Biosciences, Inc. Reports Second Quarter 2025 Financial Results
summary: Xenetic Biosciences (NASDAQ:XBIO)reported its Q2 2025 financial results, highlighting key developments in its immuno-oncology programs. The company hasexpanded its strategic partnership with The Scripps Research Instituteto advance DNase I combination therapy with CAR T-cells. Through collaboration with PeriNess, Xenetic initiated clinical studies exploring DNase I combinations with anti-CD19 CAR T cells for lymphoma and with FOLFIRINOX for pancreatic cancer.Financial results showed anet loss of $0.7 millionfor Q2 2025, with decreased R&D expenses of $0.7 million (down 29.7% YoY) and reduced G&A expenses of $0.7 million (down 41.8% YoY). The company maintained acash position of $4.8 millionat quarter-end.
